first_paragraph: ***Milestones*** is a 1916 British [silent](/wiki/Silent_film "Silent film") [drama film](/wiki/Drama_film "Drama film") directed by [Thomas Bentley](/wiki/Thomas_Bentley_(director) "Thomas Bentley (director)") and starring [Isobel Elsom](/wiki/Isobel_Elsom "Isobel Elsom"), [Owen Nares](/wiki/Owen_Nares "Owen Nares") and [Minna Grey](/wiki/Minna_Grey "Minna Grey"). It is an adaptation of the 1912 [West End](/wiki/West_End_theatre "West End theatre") play *[Milestones](/wiki/Milestones_(play) "Milestones (play)")* by [Arnold Bennett](/wiki/Arnold_Bennett "Arnold Bennett") and [Edward Knoblock](/wiki/Edward_Knoblock "Edward Knoblock"). Four years later an American [film of the same title](/wiki/Milestones_(1920_film) "Milestones (1920 film)") was released.[[1]](#cite_note-1) As of August 2010, the film is listed as one of the [British Film Institute](/wiki/British_Film_Institute "British Film Institute")'s "[75 Most Wanted](/wiki/BFI_75_Most_Wanted "BFI 75 Most Wanted")" lost films.[[2]](#cite_note-BFI-2)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1916 film

| Milestones | |
| --- | --- |
| Directed by | [Thomas Bentley](/wiki/Thomas_Bentley_(director) "Thomas Bentley (director)") |
| Written by | [Harry Engholm](/wiki/Harry_Engholm "Harry Engholm")  [H. Tipton Steck](/wiki/H._Tipton_Steck "H. Tipton Steck") |
| Based on | *[Milestones](/wiki/Milestones_(play) "Milestones (play)")* by [Arnold Bennett](/wiki/Arnold_Bennett "Arnold Bennett") & [Edward Knoblock](/wiki/Edward_Knoblock "Edward Knoblock") |
| Starring | [Isobel Elsom](/wiki/Isobel_Elsom "Isobel Elsom")   [Owen Nares](/wiki/Owen_Nares "Owen Nares")   [Minna Grey](/wiki/Minna_Grey "Minna Grey") |
| Production company | G.B. Samuelson Productions |
| Distributed by | Moss Films |
| Release date | * 1916 (1916) |
| Running time | 90 minutes |
| Country | United Kingdom |
| Language | Silent |

***Milestones*** is a 1916 British [silent](/wiki/Silent_film "Silent film") [drama film](/wiki/Drama_film "Drama film") directed by [Thomas Bentley](/wiki/Thomas_Bentley_(director) "Thomas Bentley (director)") and starring [Isobel Elsom](/wiki/Isobel_Elsom "Isobel Elsom"), [Owen Nares](/wiki/Owen_Nares "Owen Nares") and [Minna Grey](/wiki/Minna_Grey "Minna Grey"). It is an adaptation of the 1912 [West End](/wiki/West_End_theatre "West End theatre") play *[Milestones](/wiki/Milestones_(play) "Milestones (play)")* by [Arnold Bennett](/wiki/Arnold_Bennett "Arnold Bennett") and [Edward Knoblock](/wiki/Edward_Knoblock "Edward Knoblock"). Four years later an American [film of the same title](/wiki/Milestones_(1920_film) "Milestones (1920 film)") was released.[[1]](#cite_note-1) As of August 2010, the film is listed as one of the [British Film Institute](/wiki/British_Film_Institute "British Film Institute")'s "[75 Most Wanted](/wiki/BFI_75_Most_Wanted "BFI 75 Most Wanted")" lost films.[[2]](#cite_note-BFI-2)

## Plot

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Milestones_(1916_film)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Plot")]

A young anarchist and shipbuilder refuses to listen to his conservative father.

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Milestones_(1916_film)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [Isobel Elsom](/wiki/Isobel_Elsom "Isobel Elsom") as Lady Monkhurst
* [Owen Nares](/wiki/Owen_Nares "Owen Nares") as Lord Monkhurst
* [Campbell Gullan](/wiki/Campbell_Gullan "Campbell Gullan") as Sir John Rhead
* [Minna Grey](/wiki/Minna_Grey "Minna Grey") as Gertrude Rhead
* Mary Lincoln as Rose Sibley
* [Hubert Harben](/wiki/Hubert_Harben "Hubert Harben") as Sam Sibley
* [Esme Hubbard](/wiki/Esme_Hubbard "Esme Hubbard") as Nancy Sibley
* [Cecil Morton York](/wiki/Cecil_Morton_York "Cecil Morton York") as Joseph Sibley
* [Roy Travers](/wiki/Roy_Travers "Roy Travers") as Arthur Preece
* [Lionel d'Aragon](/wiki/Lionel_d%27Aragon "Lionel d'Aragon") as Andrew MacLean
* Herbert Daniel as Richard Sibley
* Ernest A. Graham as Ned Pym
* Winifred Delavente as The Honourable Muriel Pym
* [Molly Hamley-Clifford](/wiki/Molly_Hamley-Clifford "Molly Hamley-Clifford") as Mrs. Rhead
